title: THE FIND — Pattern E full family + Mrs. Patel + 2 dogs
prompt:
Multi-shot composition. THE FIND — emotional reunion payoff. Composition anchored on pre-rendered Pattern E group still (image-to-video reference) for Shots 1 and 4. Motion-only prompt — the still defines who, where, and what they look like.

Shot 1 (0-3s, static low-angle medium-wide, hold on Pattern E group still anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group
Hold the Pattern E group still composition — Eva foreground-right kneeling cradling Ginger wrapped in pumpkin cape on a soft pile of dried fall leaves beside a tower of pumpkins; Sara center-right kneeling beside Eva, hand softly on Ginger's head; Joe sitting calmly beside Eva nuzzling Ginger; Papa center-left kneeling on the porch boards behind the kids; Mama center softly standing behind the kneeling kids holding her flashlight; Mrs. Patel background-left softly on the porch by her front door holding her candy bowl. Head-sized giant lollipop on candy-cane pole at left of pumpkin tower, candy-corn string lights twinkling on porch railing, soft fabric cobweb-tunnel softly arching above, soft purple porch light gently washing the background.

Shot 2 (3-5s, soft medium close-up, slow dolly push in) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group
Tighter on Eva, Ginger and Joe at foreground-right of the group. @Eva softly hugs @Ginger a little closer, Ginger's tail softly wags from inside the pumpkin cape, Ginger softly nuzzles into Eva's collar. @Sara's left hand pets Ginger's head once. @Joe leans his fluffy white nose softly toward @Ginger in a small in-place dog-friend nuzzle. @Eva, gently: "Oh GINGER! We found you!"

Shot 3 (5-7s, soft medium, slow pan left) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group
Follow over to Papa and Mama at center-left of the group. @Papa softly tilts his head toward @Eva from his kneeling spot with a warm dad-grin. @Mama softly raises her right hand to her chest with a delighted relieved expression.

Shot 4 (7-10s, low-angle medium-wide, slow pan right + slow pull back to Pattern E anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip17-group
Settle on Mrs. Patel in background-left then ease back to the Pattern E group still composition. Mrs. Patel softly lifts her right hand off the candy bowl in a small gesture toward Ginger then returns it. Mrs. Patel: "She kept me company! I gave her water. Bravest kids on the block!" @Sara: "Thank you so much, Mrs. Patel!" @Eva, into Ginger's fur: "You're safe, Ginger. We've got you." @Joe softly nuzzles @Ginger one more time.

closingFrame: Pattern E composition holding at @ep15_house5_candy_house — @Eva foreground-right kneeling cradling @Ginger wrapped in pumpkin cape on dried leaves; @Sara center-right kneeling beside Eva, hand on Ginger's head; @Joe sitting beside Eva nuzzling Ginger in bug costume; @Papa center-left kneeling, hand on his knee; @Mama center softly standing behind the kneeling kids with hand on her chest in relief; @Mrs. Patel background-left on the porch by her front door, hand returning to her candy bowl; soft warm candy-corn string lights twinkling above.
